intent.summary: Refactor LoginViewController to extract auth logic into LoginInteractor without breaking behavior.
intent.details: Existing tests must continue to pass. Public API of LoginViewController stays unchanged. Network calls stay on a background queue.

criteria.description: All existing iOS unit + UI tests pass after the refactor.
Public symbols of LoginViewController have identical signatures pre/post refactor.
Auth logic is moved into LoginInteractor; LoginViewController has no direct AuthService calls.
Every network call stays on URLSession's background queue (no main-thread blocking).

rows.evidence_required: xcodebuild test output with all targets green
git diff of LoginViewController public declarations is empty

steps.action: Introduce LoginInteractor protocol with login(email:password:) -> Result<User,Error>
Move AuthService calls from LoginViewController into LoginInteractor; keep dispatch on background queue
Verify LoginViewController public API is unchanged via diff
Run xcodebuild test for the App scheme

scores.notes: git diff main..HEAD on public symbols of LoginViewController is empty
AuthService removed from LoginViewController; one residual reference in #if DEBUG block kept intentionally
All URLSession calls remain off the main queue; one DispatchQueue.main.async at completion remains for UI update which is correct
